market_context: X/Twitter shows moderately bullish sentiment with heavy focus on AI and tech recovery, NVDA and MSFT mentions up 25% in positive volume. Pre-market futures point to +0.4% open, no major negative catalysts beyond routine Fed commentary.

QQQ 5-day rally of 4.0% and positive options flow on mega-cap tech support continued upside. X sentiment highlights AI narrative strength.
NVDA benefits from sustained X bullish chatter and sector rotation into semiconductors. Low VIX environment favors growth names.
